para_trans: Approved under Centrally Sponsored AMRUT 2.0 Mission

Reference: - Department of Urban Development, Government Decision No. AMRUT-2025 / P.No.449 / NV-33, D. January 22, 2026.

Administrative sanction has been granted vide Government Decision dated 22nd January, 2026. the above-mentioned
Ralegaon Nagar Panchayat as the implementing agency of the project as per the project administrative approval order.
The project is in line with the Ralegaon City Water Supply Project as per this Government Refinery.
Replacement of "Ralegaon Nagar Panchayat" with "Maharashtra Jeevan Authority" as the operational mechanism.
